organizerApplication.termsRequired: You must accept the rules to continue.

checkout.deliveryOptionsIntro: E-ticket: digital ticket by email or print-at-home. For printed tickets mailed to you, choose shipping; the fee is added once per order.
checkout.eTicketDesc: Your ticket is sent by email after purchase; you can download the PDF and print it.
checkout.shippingStandardDesc: Printed tickets by mail; delivery in about 2–4 business days.
checkout.shippingExpressDesc: Faster delivery; next business day when possible.
checkout.addressRequiredShipping: Street address, postal code and city are required for printed delivery.
checkout.addressHintPhysical: Printed tickets will be sent to this address. All address fields are required.

footer.refundPolicyDesc: Refund conditions are determined by the event organiser. Refund or change may apply according to event and campaign conditions. Please review the relevant event conditions before purchase.
footer.shippingPolicyDesc: Standard shipping (DE): 2–4 business days. Express shipping (DE): Orders placed before noon (Mon–Fri) delivered next business day. Digital ticket: Printable immediately after contract. Printed ticket is chargeable; delivered to those paying shipping. Shipping options are shown in the cart.
footer.liveStockDesc: Stock information is updated in real time.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This cookie policy explains how KurdEvents uses cookies on our website. It has been prepared in accordance with European Union (EU) and German legislation (GDPR/DSGVO, ePrivacy).
cookies.whatAreDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) by the websites you visit. They are used for purposes such as ensuring the site operates correctly, remembering your preferences, and collecting usage statistics.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the basic functions of the site. Session management, security, and language preferences cannot work without these cookies. These cookies may be used without your consent under legal grounds.
cookies.functionalDesc: Used to remember your preferences (e.g. language, region) and provide you with a personalised experience. These cookies are used with your consent.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand site traffic and usage patterns. Data is usually processed anonymously or in aggregate. Used with your consent.
cookies.yourRightsDesc: You can change your cookie preferences at any time. You can delete or block cookies via your browser settings. You also have the right to access, rectify, delete, and object to the processing of your personal data under the GDPR.
cookies.contactDesc: You can contact us with questions about our cookie policy. For data protection requests, you may lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (Germany: Landesdatenschutzbehörde).

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. By continuing to use our site, you accept our use of cookies.

information.title: Information
information.intro: This page contains the information we are required to provide before and during the services offered by KurdEvents. It has been prepared in accordance with EU and German legislation (GDPR/DSGVO, BGB, distance selling).
information.dataProtectionIntro: The protection of your personal data is important to us. Below you will find information on how your data is processed.
information.controllerDesc: The data controller is White de Soul GmbH, a company based in Germany. You can reach us via the contact section on our website.
information.dataCollectedDesc: Data such as name, email, address and payment information may be collected during ticket purchases, account creation and site use. This data is used only for service provision and legal obligations.
information.legalBasisDesc: Data processing is carried out on the basis of contract performance (GDPR Article 6(1)(b)), legal obligations (Article 6(1)(c)) or legitimate interests (Article 6(1)(f)).
information.retentionDesc: Data is retained for the duration of the contract and statutory retention periods. Generally 10 years for tax and commercial documents, 3 years or a reasonable period after contract termination for other data.
information.rightsDesc: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection and complaint. You may lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (Germany: Landesdatenschutzbehörde).
information.preContractIntro: Before purchasing tickets, we provide the following information:
information.sellerDesc: White de Soul GmbH is a company based in Germany. Full address and contact details are provided during purchase and in the contract.
information.productDesc: Event tickets and related services are offered. Prices, taxes and additional costs are displayed on the purchase screen.
information.paymentDesc: Payment options are specified during checkout. Digital tickets can be printed immediately after purchase. Delivery times and costs for printed tickets are specified separately.
information.withdrawalDesc: Consumers have the right to withdraw within 14 days. However, this right may be limited for ticket sales where the event date falls before the withdrawal period. Details are set out in the distance sales agreement.
information.contactDesc: You can contact us with any questions. For data protection requests, please contact our data protection officer.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.intro: Pursuant to German Telemedia Act (TMG) § 5, our legal information is provided below.
impressum.disputeDesc: EU consumers may use the online dispute resolution platform: https://www.verbraucher-schlichter.de/

distanceSales.title: Distance Sales Agreement
distanceSales.intro: This agreement governs the distance sale of event tickets between KurdEvents and the consumer. It has been prepared in accordance with the German Civil Code (BGB) and the EU Consumer Rights Directive.
distanceSales.partiesDesc: Seller: White de Soul GmbH (based in Germany). Buyer: The consumer accepting the agreement. Seller details are provided on the Impressum page.
distanceSales.subject: Subject of the Agreement
distanceSales.subjectDesc: Distance sale of event tickets and related services. Product/service details, prices and taxes are displayed on the purchase screen.
distanceSales.contractDesc: The contract is formed when the buyer clicks the purchase button and confirms payment details. The seller sends order confirmation by email.
distanceSales.priceDesc: All prices include taxes. Any additional shipping costs are stated during purchase. Payment options: credit card, debit card, etc. Payment is taken when the contract is formed or immediately thereafter.
distanceSales.deliveryDesc: Digital tickets: Printable immediately after purchase. May be sent by email. Printed tickets: 2–4 business days by standard shipping (Germany). Delivery times and costs are specified separately.
distanceSales.withdrawalDesc: Consumers have the right to withdraw within 14 days. However, for ticket sales where the event date falls before the end of the withdrawal period, this right may be limited with the consumer's explicit consent (BGB § 312g). Withdrawal requests must be made in writing (email).
distanceSales.warrantyDesc: The seller warrants that the product conforms to the contract. In case of non-conformity, the consumer may request repair, replacement or price reduction. In the event of event cancellation, the refund policy applies.
distanceSales.liabilityDesc: The seller is not liable for indirect damages except in cases of intent or gross negligence. Statutory liability remains unaffected.
distanceSales.lawDesc: German law applies. EU consumers benefit from mandatory protective provisions of their country of residence.
distanceSales.contactDesc: For questions about the agreement, please use the contact details on the Impressum page.

onlinePayment.title: Online Payment Terms
onlinePayment.intro: This page explains the main rules and security measures for online payments made via KurdEvents. It has been prepared with regard to German law (BGB) and EU payment security standards (in particular 3D Secure / SCA).
onlinePayment.methodsDesc: Payments are primarily taken by debit/credit card. Supported card schemes and any additional methods (if available) are clearly listed at checkout. The payment provider or supported methods may change over time; the information displayed at checkout is always decisive.
onlinePayment.securityDesc: Payments are processed over an encrypted TLS connection. Where applicable, 3D Secure or similar strong customer authentication (SCA) methods are used. Your card details are not stored on KurdEvents servers; they are processed only by our authorised payment provider.
onlinePayment.authorizationDesc: Your card is usually charged at the time you confirm your order or shortly thereafter. In some cases, an initial pre-authorisation may be taken; once the transaction is completed, the pre-authorisation is either captured or released.
onlinePayment.feesDesc: If any service or processing fee is charged in addition to the ticket price, this will be clearly displayed at checkout. You will always see the total amount per order (ticket price, service fee, shipping if applicable) before you confirm the purchase.
onlinePayment.refundsDesc: If a refund or cancellation is approved, the amount will, where possible, be returned via the same payment method used for the original transaction. Depending on your bank or card issuer, it may take several business days before the refund appears on your account statement.
onlinePayment.chargebacksDesc: If you suspect an error or unauthorised use, please contact us and your bank first. For chargeback procedures initiated with your card issuer, the rules of your bank and the relevant card scheme will apply.
onlinePayment.contactDesc: If you have questions about these online payment terms, please use the contact details on the Impressum page or our support channels.

refundPage.title: Refund and Cancellation Policy
refundPage.intro: This page summarises how refunds, cancellations and changes are handled for event tickets purchased via KurdEvents. Our platform generally acts as a ticketing infrastructure; in many cases, the final rules are determined by the event organiser.
refundPage.organizerRulesDesc: For each event, applicable refund and change conditions are set by the organiser and, where possible, shown on the event page or during purchase. Campaigns, discounted tickets or special categories (e.g. group/VIP tickets) may be subject to different rules.
refundPage.eventCancellationDesc: If an event is cancelled or rescheduled, refunds, validity of tickets for the new date or alternative solutions (e.g. credit vouchers) will be handled according to the organiser's instructions. As far as possible, refunds are processed via the same payment method used for purchase.
refundPage.customerCancellationDesc: Regardless of the event date, the customer's unilateral right to cancel may be limited for many ticket sales. Under the Distance Sales Agreement and applicable law (in particular BGB § 312g), the right of withdrawal may be restricted where the event date falls before the end of the withdrawal period. Please always review the event-specific cancellation/refund conditions before purchasing.
refundPage.changesDesc: Requests to change the date, upgrade the ticket category or make similar changes are subject to organiser approval and may be handled differently per event. In some cases, only an upgrade to a higher category with an additional fee may be possible; in such cases, please contact customer service or the organiser.
refundPage.feesDesc: When processing refunds, the organiser or platform may exclude certain fees from the refund (e.g. service fees, shipping charges). Any such deductions will be indicated in the event terms and conditions in advance.
refundPage.onlinePaymentsDesc: For online payments, refund amounts are, where possible, returned via the same card or payment method. Due to banking processes, it may take several business days before the refund appears in your account. For more details, please refer to our Online Payment Terms.
refundPage.contactDesc: If you wish to request a refund or change for your tickets, please first check your order confirmation email and the explanations on the event page. If you cannot find a solution, contact us or the organiser using the contact details provided on the Impressum page.

panel.title: My Account
panel.noTickets: You haven't purchased any tickets yet.
panel.myInfoDesc: View and update your personal information.
panel.deleteTicketConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this ticket? This action cannot be undone.

myInfo.title: My Information
myInfo.addressHint: Please add house number or floor to your address if needed.
myInfo.dataProtection: We attach great importance to data protection. You can find our data protection information
myInfo.errorPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms of use govern the use of the KurdEvents website and platform. By using the site, you agree to these terms.
terms.scopeDesc: These terms apply to event ticket sales, venue and artist information, news and all related services. Ticket purchases are also governed by the Distance Sales Agreement.
terms.accountDesc: Some services may require account creation. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide. You must keep your account credentials confidential and report any unauthorised use.
terms.useDesc: You may use the platform only in a lawful manner and in accordance with these terms. Prohibited conduct includes: false information, fraud, distributing malicious software, unauthorised access to systems, infringing others' rights.
terms.contentDesc: Texts, images, logos and software on the site are owned by KurdEvents or licensors. Unauthorised copying, distribution or commercial use is prohibited.
terms.ticketsDesc: Ticket purchases are subject to the Distance Sales Agreement and relevant event terms. Prices, cancellation and refund conditions are displayed before purchase.
terms.liabilityDesc: The platform is provided "as is". Uninterrupted or error-free operation is not guaranteed. The seller is not liable for indirect damages (data loss, business loss, etc.). Statutory liability remains unaffected.
terms.terminationDesc: Your account may be suspended or closed in case of violation. You may also close your account at any time.
terms.changesDesc: These terms may be amended. Material changes will be announced on the site. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.lawDesc: German law applies. The competent court for disputes is the seller's place of business. EU consumers may refer to the courts of their country of residence.
terms.contactDesc: For questions, use the contact details on the Impressum page.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: We answer frequently asked questions about events and ticketing. This page has been prepared in accordance with German law (BGB, Fernabsatz, DSGVO) and industry practice. For more information, see our Distance Sales Agreement and Information pages.
faq.contactQ: How can I reach your customer service?
faq.contactA: You can reach us via the email or phone number in the Contact / Legal Notice (Impressum) section at the bottom of our site. You can also use the contact form on our website.
faq.hoursQ: What are your customer service hours?
faq.hoursA: Our customer service is available 7 days a week, 09:00–18:00 (CET). We respond to email requests within 2 business days.
faq.venueAddressQ: Where can I find the address of the venue?
faq.venueAddressA: On the event detail page, click the venue information to see address, transport and parking. You can also use the map to find the location.
faq.ticketDeliveryQ: I bought a ticket – where do I get it?
faq.ticketDeliveryA: KurdEvents provides digital tickets (e-tickets). After purchase, your ticket is sent by email and you can access it in the "My Tickets" section of your account. Each ticket has a unique QR code. At the entrance, show the QR code from the email or app.
faq.noEmailSmsQ: I didn't receive an email about my ticket. What should I do?
faq.noEmailSmsA: First check your inbox and spam folder. If there is no email, log in with the email you used when purchasing and open "My Tickets" to access your tickets. If the issue continues, contact customer service; we can verify and resend your ticket.
faq.refundChangeQ: Can I get a refund or change my ticket?
faq.refundChangeA: KurdEvents is not the event organiser; we only handle ticketing. Refund and change conditions are set by the organiser. Unless the event is cancelled or rescheduled, refunds or changes may not be possible outside the organiser's rules. Under BGB § 312g, the right of withdrawal is limited for ticket sales where the event date is before the end of the withdrawal period. Please check the event terms before purchasing.
faq.studentDiscountQ: Are there student or discounted tickets?
faq.studentDiscountA: Discounts vary by event. If student, senior or disabled discounts are available, they are shown in the ticket categories or event details. Customers who buy discounted tickets must show proof (student ID, ID card, etc.) at the entrance. Those who do not may be charged the difference.
faq.cartTimeoutQ: Why is there a time limit on tickets in the cart?
faq.cartTimeoutA: To be fair to other visitors, tickets in your cart are reserved for a set time (usually 10–15 minutes). If you do not complete the purchase in that time, they are released. The timer is extended when you go to the payment page.
faq.maxTicketsQ: How many tickets can I buy at once?
faq.maxTicketsA: The maximum per transaction is set by the organiser; it is usually between 4 and 10. You can place a second order for more tickets or contact customer service for group requests.
faq.reservationQ: Can I reserve a ticket without paying yet?
faq.reservationA: KurdEvents does not offer reservations. Tickets are only confirmed by purchase. When payment is completed, the contract is formed and the ticket is yours.
faq.boxSeatsQ: How do I buy box or VIP area tickets?
faq.boxSeatsA: Box and VIP areas may not be sold as single seats; the total price may apply per capacity. Such tickets are listed under "Box" or "VIP" on the event page. Price and capacity are shown on the purchase screen.
faq.multiEventQ: Can I buy tickets for different events in one order?
faq.multiEventA: Yes. You can add tickets for different events to the cart and pay once. Separate tickets are created for each event and listed under "My Tickets".
faq.printedTicketQ: Do I need a printed ticket after buying online?
faq.printedTicketA: No. With an e-ticket, you can show the QR code from the email or your account at the entrance. You can keep it on your phone or print it. Some events accept only digital tickets; this is stated on the event page.
faq.serviceFeeQ: Why is there a service fee when buying tickets online?
faq.serviceFeeA: The service fee covers the platform, secure payment and ticket delivery. The amount is shown on the purchase screen. This practice is common in the industry and complies with German law.
faq.childrenTicketsQ: Do I need tickets for my children?
faq.childrenTicketsA: Ticket policy is set by the organiser. Unless otherwise stated, children may also need a ticket. Any age limit or free entry is stated in the event details.
faq.groupDiscountQ: Is there a discount for group or bulk purchases?
faq.groupDiscountA: Group discounts vary by event. Contact customer service for bulk requests. Some events offer discounts above a certain quantity; details are on the event page.
faq.paymentMethodsQ: What payment methods can I use?
faq.paymentMethodsA: You can use Visa, Mastercard and other common credit/debit cards. Your card must be enabled for online and 3D Secure transactions. Payment data is processed via a secure payment system.
faq.lostTicketQ: I lost my ticket. What should I do?
faq.lostTicketA: If you have an e-ticket, log in and open "My Tickets" to access it again. You can also search your email. For physical tickets, reprinting may not be possible; we recommend keeping e-tickets on your device or as a printed copy.
faq.wrongEventQ: I bought a ticket for the wrong date or event. What can I do?
faq.wrongEventA: Always check your cart before completing the purchase. After that, contact customer service for refund or change. Refund rules depend on the organiser and event terms. Check the event terms before buying.
faq.seatSelectionQ: Why can't I select a seat for some events?
faq.seatSelectionA: Depending on the organiser, some events have numbered (seated) and others unnumbered (standing) areas. For unnumbered events, only the category (e.g. floor, tier) is selected; staff will direct you at the entrance.
faq.legalNoteDesc: This FAQ is for information only. For binding terms, see our Distance Sales Agreement, Terms of Use and Information pages. German (BGB, Fernabsatz, DSGVO) and EU law apply. EU consumers may use https://www.verbraucher-schlichter.de/ for disputes.

b2b.title: B2B Terms and Conditions
b2b.intro: This page contains the rules and contract terms applicable to organisers, advertisers and sponsors who wish to partner with KurdEvents. Prepared in accordance with German law (BGB, HGB, UWG, DSGVO) and industry practice.

organizers.title: Organisers
organizers.registrationDesc: Contracts are concluded only with entrepreneurs within the meaning of BGB § 14. By accepting these terms, the organiser confirms entrepreneur status. Registration is done via the online form. Data must be true and complete. KurdEvents may accept or reject applications. Credit checks may be requested before acceptance.
organizers.contractDesc: The contract is formed when KurdEvents sends the confirmation email. After registration, organisers may test platform functions but cannot release events for sale until the contract is concluded. Events may only be entered for events organised by the organiser.
organizers.useDesc: The organiser must maintain technical requirements (hardware, OS, internet, browser). Access credentials must be kept secure; unauthorised use must be reported immediately. KurdEvents may temporarily block access.
organizers.servicesDesc: KurdEvents enables organisers to sell tickets for their events via the platform. Average platform availability is 96% per year. KurdEvents reserves the right to modify and improve the platform.
organizers.dutiesDesc: The organiser must provide required legal information and guarantee its correctness. The organiser warrants that event images and content are lawfully used. The organiser is responsible for all data entered and indemnifies KurdEvents against third-party claims.
organizers.ddgInfoDesc: Under Digitale-Dienste-Gesetz (DDG) § 5, organisers as providers of digital services must provide the following information:
organizers.ddgInfo2: Legal form (Rechtsform: GmbH, AG, sole proprietorship, etc.)
organizers.ddgInfo3: Address for service of process (ladungsfähige Anschrift)
organizers.ddgInfo5: Trade register and registration number (Handelsregister, Registernummer)
organizers.ddgInfoHow: This information is requested in the organiser application form and stored under the B2B contract.
organizers.feesDesc: Ticket prices are set by the organiser. Platform and transaction fees are calculated per the applicable fee schedule. Fees are generally due even in case of event cancellation, unless KurdEvents is solely responsible. A cancellation fee per ticket may apply.
organizers.settlementDesc: From collected proceeds, KurdEvents first deducts its fees; the remainder is passed to the organiser. Past events are accounted within five business days after the event date. Payment is made to the organiser's bank account. SEPA direct debit mandate is required. Objections to statements must be made in writing within two weeks.
organizers.disruptionDesc: Cancellations, postponements or other disruptions must be reported to KurdEvents immediately and ticket sales must be stopped. The organiser authorises KurdEvents to process refunds. Refunds are made only to ticket buyers. Advance payments may need to be returned.
organizers.liabilityDesc: No contractual relationship exists between KurdEvents and ticket buyers regarding the event. The organiser bears full responsibility for conducting the event and legal compliance. The organiser indemnifies KurdEvents against third-party claims arising from disruptions or breaches.
organizers.applyCTADesc: Fill out the application form that collects the information specified in DDG § 5 and the B2B contract.

advertisers.title: Advertisers
advertisers.eligibilityDesc: Parties wishing to purchase advertising space must be entrepreneurs within the meaning of BGB § 14. A separate advertising contract is concluded. Content must comply with German law (UWG, TMG, DSGVO) and platform rules.
advertisers.contentDesc: Advertising must not be misleading, offensive or illegal. The advertiser warrants ownership or licence of provided materials. The advertiser indemnifies KurdEvents against third-party claims. KurdEvents may remove content in case of infringement or for good cause.
advertisers.pricingDesc: Advertising fees depend on placement type, duration and target audience. Payment must be made within the agreed period. KurdEvents reserves the right to change prices. Contract duration and termination are set in the advertising agreement.
advertisers.termsDesc: The advertiser must comply with data protection (GDPR). Customer data may only be used for agreed purposes. The advertising partnership may be terminated by either party in writing. Confidentiality obligations survive contract termination.

sponsors.title: Event Sponsors
sponsors.overviewDesc: Those wishing to sponsor events enter a separate sponsorship agreement with KurdEvents or the organiser. Sponsorship may include brand visibility, venue use or other arrangements. Terms are determined on a project basis.
sponsors.brandingDesc: The sponsor warrants ownership or licence of provided logos and materials. KurdEvents and the organiser may use the brand in event materials (posters, digital channels, tickets). Duration and scope are set in the sponsorship agreement.
sponsors.contractDesc: Sponsorship fees and provided rights are set in the contract. The sponsor must fulfil contractual obligations. Refund or postponement terms in case of event cancellation are set in the sponsorship agreement.
sponsors.contactDesc: For sponsorship enquiries, contact us via the Impressum page or b2b@kurdevents.com. Detailed offers and contract drafts are provided on request.

b2b.contactDesc: For B2B cooperation, organiser applications, advertising and sponsorship, use the contact details on the Impressum page. Organiser applications can also be submitted via the site.

organizerSupport.title: Organizer Support
organizerSupport.subtitle: Guide to adding events and managing information
organizerSupport.intro: This page is a support document for those who want to add and manage events as organisers on the KurdEvents platform. It provides guidance on the application process, approval waiting period, completing your information, and which details can be changed.

howToAddEvents.title: How to Add Events?
howToAddEvents.step1: Log in: Sign in with your organiser account.
howToAddEvents.step2: Go to the management panel: Access the panel via "Management" or "Login" from the top menu.
howToAddEvents.step3: Events page: Click "Events" in the left menu.
howToAddEvents.step4: New event: Click "New Event" or "Add Event".
howToAddEvents.step5: Fill in the form: Complete all required fields such as event name, date, venue, ticket types, prices and description.
howToAddEvents.step6: Save: Submit the form to create your event. The event will enter the approval process.

approvalProcess.title: Approval Process and Waiting
approvalProcess.desc: Your organiser application and events you add are reviewed by the platform administrator. This process is usually completed within a few business days.
approvalProcess.pending: While your application is "Pending", you cannot add events. Your organiser role must first be approved.
approvalProcess.approved: After approval, you can add, edit and start ticket sales for events from the management panel.
approvalProcess.patience: Please be patient during the approval process. You can contact us via the Impressum page for any questions.

completeInfo.title: Complete Your Information Fully
completeInfo.desc: For smooth operation as an organiser, all your information must be complete and accurate.
completeInfo.required: The fields requested in the Organisation Application Details section (company name, legal form, address, phone, trade register, tax number, representative name, display name) are required under DDG § 5 and the B2B agreement.
completeInfo.where: You can view and complete missing fields at "Management" → "Organisation Details".
completeInfo.tip: Leaving no information incomplete is important for both legal compliance and building trust with your customers.

editableInfo.title: Which Information Can Be Changed?

editable.title: Editable information
editable.desc: After approval, you can update the following at any time:
editable.items: Address, phone, legal form, trade register, registration number, VAT ID (USt-IdNr.)

readOnly.title: Non-editable information
readOnly.desc: After approval, the following fields cannot be changed for security and contract integrity. You can only fill them in for the first time if you left them empty:
readOnly.items: Company or business name, authorised representative (name), display name for organisations

editableInfo.profileNote: Your first and last name in personal information also cannot be changed once saved in your organiser account.

summary.title: Summary
summary.list1: Submit your organiser application and wait for approval.
summary.list2: Complete all your organisation information fully.
summary.list3: After approval, add events via Management → Events.
summary.list4: You can update address, phone, tax number etc. when needed.
summary.list5: Company name, representative name and organisation name cannot be changed after approval.
